query:
UPDATE rollRooms r
SET totalPrizes = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rollRoomPrizes p WHERE p.rollRoomId = r.id),
    totalValue = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.value * p.quantity), 0) FROM rollRoomPrizes p WHERE p.rollRoomId = r.id)
WHERE r.id IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM rollRooms ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 10) AS sub);

WHERE r.id IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM rollRooms ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 10) AS sub);
